name: Dr Trevor Bachmeyer
title: SmashweRx — Injury Repair, Mitochondrial Health & Longevity
bio: Dr Trevor Bachmeyer is the highest-volume voice in the library — 366 podcast episodes covering injury repair, mitochondrial health, autoimmune protocols, and longevity peptides. His SmashweRx and Unbreakable Podcast content runs the gamut from masterclass-format deep dives (BPC-157 longevity, KPV anti-aging, Methylene Blue, Retatrutide) to specific clinical reversals — Hashimoto's, lupus, endometriosis, Graves' disease, dementia, Parkinson's, Epstein-Barr, fibromyalgia. His POV is reversal-oriented: most chronic conditions are not life sentences, and the right peptide-and-protocol combination paired with mitochondrial repair can unwind the disease state.
credentials: 366+ published episodes covering peptides, hormones, and chronic-disease reversal
